title: gonostegia scabra
intro: Gonostegia scabra, also known as the rough Gonostegia or rough Gonostegia tree, is a plant species native to Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Gonostegia scabra include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Gonostegia scabra is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots and bark in water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
